case_title: SF HOUSING AUTHORITY vs. DOLE, LINDA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOLE, LINDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 24 HARBOR ROAD, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $709.37 RENT, $109.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $818.37, LEASE FORFEITED
